Recent Bills

Bills with the most recent activity:

Bill Title Status Last Action Date Last Action
SF 2135 A bill for an act providing for the regulation of commercial establishments possessing or controlling animals other than agricultural animals, providing fees, making appropriations, providing penalties, and making penalties applicable. Introduced 2026-02-07 Subcommittee: Driscoll, Green, and Zimmer.
HF 708 A bill for an act relating to health care decisions related to palliative care, hospice programs, life-sustaining procedures, and out-of-hospital do-not-resuscitate orders.(See HF 2305.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2305.
HF 2020 A bill for an act relating to hunter education requirements.(See HF 2335.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2335.
HF 2057 A bill for an act providing a standing appropriation to the state board of regents for pediatric cancer research at the university of Iowa hospitals and clinics.(See HF 2310.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2310.
HF 2074 A bill for an act permitting a city to create entertainment districts allowing for the possession or consumption of alcoholic beverages in certain public places.(See HF 2325.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2325.
HF 2091 A bill for an act relating to fraudulent practices involving academic credentials and providing penalties.(See HF 2337.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2337.
HF 2106 A bill for an act relating to education, including by modifying provisions related to the protected speech and expression rights of students enrolled in school districts, charter schools, and innovation zone schools and the duties of the department of education, and providing civil penalties.(See HF 2336.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2336.
HF 2121 A bill for an act prohibiting school districts, charter schools, and innovation zone schools from providing any program, curriculum, test, survey, questionnaire, promotion, or instruction relating to gender theory or sexual orientation instruction in grades seven through twelve.(See HF 2338.) Passed Committee 2026-02-06 Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2338.
HF 2283 A bill for an act relating to grid-enhancing technologies and reconductoring, including study and reporting requirements. Introduced 2026-02-06 Subcommittee: Thomson, C., Bagniewski and Wilz, H. H.J. 02/06.
HF 2284 A bill for an act relating to wind turbine inspections, and providing penalties. Introduced 2026-02-06 Subcommittee: Latham, McBurney and Nordman. H.J. 02/06.
HF 2287 A bill for an act relating to liability for injuries caused by vaccines. Introduced 2026-02-06 Rereferred to Judiciary. H.J. 229.
HF 2298 A bill for an act providing for the regulation of commercial establishments possessing or controlling nonagricultural animals, providing penalties, and making penalties applicable. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Agriculture. H.J. 222.
HF 2299 A bill for an act relating to reporting total gasoline and diesel fuel gallonage sold and dispensed by retail dealers for a determination period. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Agriculture. H.J. 222.
HF 2300 A bill for an act limiting the authority of counties and cities to regulate hemp production on land zoned for specific purposes. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Local Government. H.J. 222.
HF 2301 A bill for an act establishing a domestic abuse offender registry, and providing penalties. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Public Safety. H.J. 223.
HF 2302 A bill for an act establishing a domestic abuse offender registry, and providing penalties. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Public Safety. H.J. 223.
HF 2303 A bill for an act relating to regulation of professional and amateur kickboxing by the state commissioner of athletics. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to State Government. H.J. 223.
HF 2304 A bill for an act relating to indirect costs charged to state-funded grants, and including applicability provisions.(Formerly HSB 642.) Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, placed on calendar. H.J. 223.
HF 2305 A bill for an act relating to health care decisions related to palliative care, hospice programs, life-sustaining procedures, and out-of-hospital do-not-resuscitate orders.(Formerly HF 708.) Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, placed on calendar. H.J. 223.
HF 2306 A bill for an act modifying the responsibilities of school district teachers and other educational staff related to students who have individualized education programs or plans under section 504 of the federal Rehabilitation Act. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Education. H.J. 223.
HF 2307 A bill for an act authorizing the board of educational examiners to issue provisional coaching authorizations. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Education. H.J. 223.
HF 2308 A bill for an act relating to state participation in the federal tax credit program for individual contributions to scholarship granting organizations. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Ways and Means. H.J. 224.
HF 2309 A bill for an act relating to public library requirements for materials harmful to minors, and providing civil and criminal penalties, and including effective date and applicability provisions. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Judiciary. H.J. 224.
HF 2310 A bill for an act providing a standing appropriation to the state board of regents for pediatric cancer research at the university of Iowa hospitals and clinics.(Formerly HF 2057.) Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Appropriations. H.J. 224.
HF 2311 A bill for an act relating to the use of specie as legal tender. Introduced 2026-02-06 Introduced, referred to Commerce. H.J. 224.
